description_long: This is a corner wooden shelving unit with three open shelves, designed to fit snugly into a right-angled corner. The structure is made of dark brown wood with a visible grain pattern, giving it a sturdy and classic appearance. The shelves are open at the front, allowing easy access to stored items, and the back is angled to fit into a corner space. The shelves currently hold several green glass bottles and a few brown rectangular objects, possibly books or boxes. The sides and back are solid wood panels, while the front is entirely open with no doors or handles. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for use in urban environments such as garages, shops, or communal spaces.
description: A dark brown wooden corner shelving unit with three open shelves, currently holding bottles and rectangular objects. The front is open for easy access, and the back is angled for corner placement.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open shelves with bottles and rectangular objects visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a solid wooden panel with no openings or visible contents.
description_view_2: Alternate front view, similar to view 0, with a clearer look at the objects on the shelves.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing a solid wooden panel with no visible openings.
